note: Hand-entered one-off events (e.g. from posters/flyers spotted in the wild, or curated holiday programming). Each entry is merged into the dataset alongside live-source events. Use a stable id, real lat/lon, and ISO local startDateTime / endDateTime with the Pacific offset.

events.title: Lifetime Activities Summer Camp Open House
events.description: Free preview of Lifetime Activities' summer camps for ages 5-15. Carnival-style tennis and pickleball stations, an exclusive Play More - Save More camp promo, and raffle prizes (Sky Zone gift cards, Pokemon cards, a free camp). Limited space — register via the QR on-site. Parents must supervise; no drop-offs.

events.title: Hillsborough Memorial Day Parade & Festival
events.description: Annual parade kicks off at 10am, followed by a music festival and the observance ceremony at North School field at 11:30am.

events.title: Rohnert Park Memorial Day Remembrance Ceremony
events.description: Annual remembrance ceremony at the Rohnert Park Community Center to honor fallen service members.

events.title: USS Pampanito Memorial Day Lost Boat Ceremony
events.description: Annual ceremony aboard the WWII submarine USS Pampanito at Pier 45 honoring the 52 American submarines lost in World War II.

events.title: FoodieLand Night Market — Memorial Day Weekend
events.description: Outdoor food festival with 175 vendors from across the globe, plus family-friendly entertainment. Runs Friday through Sunday of the weekend.
